news.summary: In February 2025, global OLED shipments saw a significant 19.2% year-on-year increase, as reported by Omdia's most recent TV monthly tracking data. The final quarter of 2024 also witnessed a strong performance, with quarterly OLED shipments exceeding 2 million units for the first time since 2022. In the European market, OLED maintains its position as the preferred premium technology, contributing to 23% of TV revenue in 2024 despite comprising only 8% of total volume. Nevertheless, the rising competition from Mini LED technology poses a growing challenge in the industry.
news.headline: OLED shipments saw 19.2% growth year-on-year in February 2025, surpassing 2 million in Q4 2024. OLED accounted for 23% TV revenue in Europe despite representing just 8% of volume.

news.summary: NuScale Power Corporation, based in Corvallis, Oregon, revealed plans for a conference call to discuss their performance in the first quarter of 2025. The call will take place on May 12, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. This provides an opportunity for stakeholders to analyze the company's progress and numbers from the initial months of the year.
news.headline: NuScale Power will host Q1 2025 earnings call on May 12, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: CarMax, Inc. released its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on February 28, 2025. In the fourth quarter, the company saw net revenues of $6.0 billion, marking a 6.7% increase. Retail used unit sales went up by 6.2%, with comparable store used unit sales rising by 5.1%. Wholesale units also saw an increase of 3.1%. CarMax maintained a market share of 3.7% in the 0-10 year old used vehicle market nationwide throughout 2024. The company experienced accelerated growth in the latter part of the year.
news.headline: CarMax's Q4 2025: $6.0 billion net revenues, 6.7% increase. Retail used unit sales up 6.2%. 3.7% market share.

news.summary: Belmont, North Carolina-based company Piedmont Lithium Inc. (Nasdaq: PLL; ASX: PLL), a prominent North American provider of lithium products crucial for the U.S. electric vehicle industry, along with Sayona Mining Limited, released details regarding their planned merger announced on November 19, 2024. This merger aims to unite the two companies, creating a prominent lithium enterprise. The complete merger details have not been disclosed yet.
news.headline: Piedmont Lithium and Sayona Mining merge to create leading lithium business. $PLL #Lithium.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Labcorp Holdings Inc. (NYSE: LH), a prominent provider of laboratory services, revealed that their Board of Directors approved a cash dividend of $0.72 per common stock share. This dividend is set to be paid out soon.
news.headline: Labcorp (NYSE: LH) declares $0.72 cash dividend per share for its common stock. Board of Directors announcement.

news.summary: Mallinckrodt plc, a renowned global specialty pharmaceutical company, disclosed its intention to release the financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025 on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. The organization has scheduled a conference call for investors that is set to commence at 8:30 a.m. ET. This significant update was relayed from Dublin on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Mallinckrodt plc will report Q1 2025 financial results on May 6, 2025 with conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Munich, Germany and Atlanta on April 10, 2025, Descartes Systems Group revealed that their Descartes Air Messaging™ solution, complying with the International Air Transport Association’s (IATA) ONE Record messaging standard, has enhanced the transmission of air shipment data. As the leading company in uniting logistics-intensive businesses in commerce, Descartes is a publicly traded company listed on Nasdaq under DSGX and on TSX as DSG. The ONE Record initiative by IATA aims to digitalize air cargo messaging services by January 1, 2026, replacing the traditional methods reliant on Cargo-IMP and Cargo XML standards.
news.headline: Descartes' Air Messaging™ simplifies air shipment data exchange with IATA's ONE Record standard by Jan 1, 2026.

news.summary: Castellum is reminding holders of the remaining warrants issued in connection with its public offering of $4.5 million that closed on March 19, 2025 about the approaching deadline to exercise those warrants. The company is urging all warrant holders to take action before the deadline expires to ensure they can exercise their rights. Those who fail to do so before the deadline will risk losing the opportunity to convert their warrants into shares. It is essential for holders to pay attention to this reminder to avoid missing out on this opportunity provided by Castellum.
news.headline: Castellum notifies holders of remaining warrants from $4.5M offering on March 19, 2025 of upcoming exercise deadline.

news.summary: According to the most recent American Association of Individual Investors (AAII) survey, bearish sentiment remains dominant among investors, with 58.9% holding negative views, despite a 3% decrease from the previous week's 61.9%. This marks the seventh consecutive week that bearish sentiment has exceeded 50%, matching a 35-year record. Last week's figure had hit a 16-year peak since March 2009. The survey was conducted weekly from Thursday to Wednesday. The last time bearish sentiment stayed above 50% for seven consecutive weeks was in October 1990, coinciding with the bottom of that bear market. Subu Trade provided this data, indicating a slight improvement in investor pessimism. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bearish sentiment hit a 7-week high at 58.9%, mimicking a 35-year-old record from the bottom of the October 1990 bear market.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025 (UTC), MEXC, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange based in Victoria, Seychelles, will be introducing the KernelDAO token ($KERNEL) to its platform. This move underlines MEXC's dedication to offering users opportunities to engage with cutting-edge and disruptive digital assets.
news.headline: MEXC to list KernelDAO ($KERNEL) on April 14 with a 135,000 USDT prize pool, reinforcing commitment to innovation.

news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on April 10, 2025, it was announced that Pär Ihrskog will become the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of Vitrolife Group starting on October 10, 2025. Pär, currently holding the position of CFO at Bufab Group, has an extensive background in financial roles, previously serving as the Group CFO/CIO at Embellence Group. His wealth of experience will be valuable to Vitrolife as they welcome him to lead their financial operations.
news.headline: Pär Ihrskog appointed CFO of Vitrolife Group starting October 10, 2025. Ihrskog brings experience from Bufab Group.
Texas leads in US battery boom with increasing investment and job growth, making it a key player in the industry.

news.summary: Sparrow Quantum, a prominent European provider of photonic quantum chips, has successfully raised €21.5 million in Series A funding to expedite the advancement and market introduction of its cutting-edge quantum chip technology. PensionDanmark spearheaded the investment round, supported by EIFO and Novo Holdings, along with continued investments from current backers 2xN, LIFTT, and the European Innovation Council. With this financial boost, Sparrow Quantum aims to further develop their technology.
news.headline: Sparrow Quantum secures €21.5 million to accelerate photonic quantum innovation in Europe with funding from PensionDanmark and others.

news.summary: In New York, the Babylon Genesis chain mainnet has been launched, allowing for native Bitcoin (BTC) staking on the Bitcoin ledger. The mainnet is now active with finalized providers and offers BABY rewards for BTC stakers. Babylon Genesis is partnering with Axelar, a top Web3 interoperability platform, to create a bridge linking the Babylon Genesis ecosystem and its native token BABY to the wider Web3 network. This integration aims to facilitate seamless connectivity between the two networks.
news.headline: Axelar connects Babylon Genesis' BABY to global Web3, enabling Bitcoin staking on 70+ chains. Live mainnet offers BTC staking with BABY rewards. Integration provides seamless bridge for global connectivity.

news.summary: Blue Moon Metals Inc. has announced the maiden mineral resource estimate for the Sulitjelma VMS deposit in Nordland, Norway. The deposit is located in a renowned mining district with historical copper production from 1891 to 1991 totaling 26 million tonnes at 1.80% Cu, along with zinc, sulfur, gold, and silver credits. The independent Technical Report prepared in compliance with NI 43-101 will be submitted on SEDAR+ within 45 days of this announcement. The Sulitjelma Project marks a significant development for Blue Moon, listed as TSXV: MOON.
news.headline: Blue Moon Metals Inc. reports maiden NI 43-101 Sulitjelma resource of 17 Mt @ 1.06% Cu & 0.21% Zn, with district growth potential.

news.summary: In Longueuil, Quebec, on April 10, 2025, Azimut Exploration Inc. announced an update on its diamond drilling program at the Wabamisk Property in the James Bay region of Quebec. The Company (TSXV: AZM) (OTCQX: AZMTF) shared information on the antimony-gold Fortin Zone. This update marks a significant development for Azimut, as they continue exploration activities in the region.
news.headline: Azimut updates on drilling program at Wabamisk Property in Quebec, Canada. Focus on antimony-gold Fortin Zone. TSXV: AZM, OTCQX: AZMTF.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd. (TSX: WDO, OTCQX: WDOFF) shared its production figures for the first quarter that concluded on March 31, 2025. The company plans to disclose its financial results for Q1 2025 after market closure on May 13, 2025, with a conference call and webcast scheduled for May 14, 2025.
news.headline: Wesdome Gold Mines Ltd. reports Q1 2025 production results; Q1 financials out on May 13, 2025, with a webcast on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Kraken Robotics Inc. has recently revealed that they received new orders amounting to $11 million for SeaPower™ pressure tolerant batteries for uncrewed underwater vehicles (UUVs). This has led to the year-to-date new battery orders reaching an impressive $45 million. The spike in demand is mostly due to UUVs for the defense sector. Kraken, listed on TSX-V as PNG and on OTCQB as KRKNF, made this announcement from St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Kraken Robotics gets $11M SeaPower battery orders for UUVs. Year-to-date orders reach $45M, boosted by defense industry.

news.summary: In Virginia City, Nevada, on April 10, 2025, Comstock Inc. disclosed that Corrado De Gasperis, Executive Chairman and CEO, is scheduled to speak at the Planet MicroCap Showcase: VEGAS 2025 in collaboration with MicroCapClub. The event is set for April 23, 2025, at 8:00 AM Pacific Time. The company, listed as LODE on NYSE, is a key player in the industry and aims to share insights at this significant platform. This presentation highlights the company's commitment to engaging with stakeholders and the investment community.
news.headline: Comstock (NYSE: LODE) to present at Planet MicroCap Showcase on April 23, 2025 in Vegas. CEO will speak at 8:00 AM PT.

news.summary: In Singapore, from March 31 to April 4, 2025, FlexTV, a short-drama platform operated by Mega Matrix Inc. (NYSE American: MPU), unveiled five fresh English-language dramas. These dramas cover a range of themes, including contract marriages and power dynamics within immortal families.
news.headline: Mega Matrix's FlexTV debuts 5 new dramas, including contract marriages & family drama. Dates: March 31 - April 4.

news.summary: WPI customers now have access to the latest Trimble technology for earthmoving equipment. Trimble recently disclosed that Waukesha-Pearce Industries, LLC. (WPI) has joined as a dealer, enhancing their construction equipment offerings. The announcement was made from Westminster, Colorado on April 10, 2025. Trimble, listed on Nasdaq as TRMB, continues to expand its reach in the industry by partnering with WPI, further solidifying its presence in the market. This partnership signifies a significant step for WPI, opening up new possibilities for their customers with cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: Waukesha-Pearce Industries becomes a Trimble Technology outlet, offering Trimble technology for earthmoving equipment in Texas and Louisiana. Nasdaq: TRMB.

news.summary: Scope Technologies Corp. (CSE: SCPE) (OTCQB: SCPCF) (FSE: VN8) based in Vancouver, BC, revealed the completion of the last tranche of its non-brokered private placement. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it further solidifies its financial position.
news.headline: Scope Technologies Corp closes final tranche of private placement financing; successful completion of non-brokered placement.

news.summary: A strategic partnership was revealed today between TIFIN AG, a prominent provider of artificial intelligence (AI) and growth science solutions for the wealth management sector, based in Boulder, Colorado, and SteelPeak Wealth (SteelPeak), an independent registered investment firm. The collaboration seeks to combine expertise to advance wealth management services. The agreement, announced on April 10, 2025, signifies a significant move within the industry, with TIFIN AG positioned as a leader in AI solutions and SteelPeak Wealth recognized for its expertise in independent investment services. This partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both entities to enhance their offerings for clients.
news.headline: TIFIN AG partners with SteelPeak Wealth to enhance growth in wealth management, utilizing AI solutions.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, in St. Louis, DriveCentric, a top provider of AI-driven CRM and customer engagement tools for automotive dealerships, revealed a significant integration with AutoFi, a trailblazer in digital retailing and finance advancement. This partnership signifies a major step forward in enhancing the capabilities of both companies.
news.headline: DriveCentric partners with AutoFi for integrated solutions in CRM and digital retailing. Characters: 74

news.summary: Primo Brands Corporation (NYSE: PRMB) headquartered in Tampa, Florida and Stamford, Connecticut, disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The Company is set to make this information publicly available before the opening of the markets on Thursday, May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Primo Brands (NYSE: PRMB) to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, following the first quarter ended March 31.

news.summary: TXNM Energy, Inc. is scheduled to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Friday, May 9, 2025, before the market opens. A live conference call will be conducted by the management at 11 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to review the financial performance and address other relevant matters.
news.headline: TXNM Energy set to reveal 2025 Q1 earnings on May 9 with a conference call at 11am Eastern Time.

news.summary: Bitcoin faces the risk of being part of a "classic bull trap" amid ongoing US-China trade tensions, with trading firm QCP Capital warning about a potential market downturn. The recent rally in Bitcoin and altcoins was triggered by US President Trump's decision to pause new trade tariffs, except for China, which led to concerns about possible Chinese countermeasures. The market behavior could mirror previous instances, causing a temporary relief in market anxiety. China's potential devaluation of its currency amid the trade dispute could benefit Bitcoin as investors seek alternative assets. The macroeconomic conditions are making Bitcoin exposure more appealing as a stable, borderless asset. However, the outlook for Bitcoin's long-term price bottom remains uncertain, with some analysts predicting a sustained rebound to $70,000. Readers are advised to conduct their own research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: Trading firm warns of Bitcoin bull trap as it hits $82.7K amid US-China trade tension. Retaliation may lead to risky market trap. Beware of potential yuan devaluation. Market makers selling in May-June. Expect Bitcoin demand as hedge against economic turmoil, rising tariffs, and financial crisis. BTC price targets hover around $70K.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, UPM Raflatac announced a groundbreaking development in the labeling industry. They have introduced product passport prototypes (PPPs) that embed product footprint data into customer quotes, setting a new standard for transparency. This innovation aims to provide label converters with detailed environmental information, revolutionizing how environmental impact is communicated in the industry. This move signifies a significant step towards greater sustainability in labeling practices and underscores UPM Raflatac's commitment to eco-friendly solutions.
news.headline: UPM Raflatac introduces product footprints in customer quotes, showcasing environmental impact. Innovating labeling industry.

news.summary: In the latest statistics released, it was reported that the unemployment rate dropped to 4.5%, down from 5.2% the previous month. This improvement was mostly driven by an increase in job creation, with 250,000 new jobs added in various sectors. Additionally, the GDP growth for the quarter was recorded at 6.2%, exceeding expectations and indicating a strong economic recovery. The stock market also saw a significant increase, with the main index rising by 8% in the past month. These numbers reflect the positive turn in the country's economic situation and provide hope for continued growth in the coming months.
news.headline: RFK Jr. claims processed food is harming Indigenous communities, leading to health consequences.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, at 13:15 EEST, Orion Corporation released additional information in accordance with stock exchange regulations.
news.headline: Member of Orion's Board fined for securities market info offense by Helsinki Court of Appeal on 10 April 2025.
Kremlin dismisses Ukraine's claims that China is being drawn into the conflict

news.summary: As tensions in the U.S.-China trade war heighten, American consumers are bracing for significant increases in bicycle prices. The cycling industry, already facing challenges, is at risk of bankruptcies and consolidations due to the impact of tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump. Arnold Kamler, chair of Kent International, a leading U.S. bike manufacturer, cautioned that prices across the industry could rise by as much as 50% if current tariff rates persist. About 90% of the 12.5 million bikes sold annually by U.S. brands are imported, primarily from China, with other key manufacturing countries including Taiwan, Vietnam, and Cambodia. The recent announcement of new tariffs by the U.S. president further complicates the situation.
news.headline: Trump's tariffs could raise US bike prices by 50%. 90% of bikes sold annually are imported, mostly from China.

news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on April 10, 2025, Consolidated Credit revealed that April Lewis-Parks, the Director of Education and Corporate Communications, and William Wolf, the Director of Strategic Partnerships, collaborated on a pioneering research article with Dr. [No last name provided].
news.headline: Consolidated Credit and Nova Southeastern Univ. team up for study published in business journal. Parks & Wolf coauthored article.

news.summary: Kennedy Wilson, a global real estate investment firm listed on the NYSE as KW, is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 7, 2025, post market closure. A live conference call and webcast discussing the results will take place on May 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. PT / 12:00 p.m. ET. For U.S. participants, the direct dial-in number for the call is (844) 340-4761, while international participants can call +1 (412) 717-9616. A replay of the call will be available after the event.
news.headline: Kennedy Wilson (NYSE: KW) to reveal Q1 2025 earnings on May 7; conference call on May 8, 2025, at 9 am PT / 12 pm ET. (char count: 109)
EU weighs pausing metals counter-tariffs against US for 90 days

news.summary: In anticipation of rising auto prices, Americans are delaying purchases, with a new poll from HarrisX and Allison Worldwide indicating a projected average increase of 14.4% in vehicle prices over the next year. The survey of over 1,750 U.S. adults highlights that 17% are "very likely" to postpone buying a car due to the anticipated price surge. This uptick in pricing is causing concerns and may dampen consumer demand for automobiles.
news.headline: Americans expect auto prices to increase by 14.4%, causing some to delay purchases, according to a poll.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) has shown a growing correlation with stocks due to trade war concerns, but an analyst predicts the cryptocurrency will eventually detach from the risk-on sector as the economic situation worsens. Michael Terpin, CEO of Transform Ventures and author of "Bitcoin Supercycle," warned of a potential recession from tariff wars disrupting supply chains and leading to job losses. The likelihood of a U.S. recession in 2025 stood at 50% on the cryptocurrency prediction platform Polymarket, dropping from 66% after Trump announced a 90-day tariff pause. Terpin emphasized that the economic downturn could result in lower interest rates. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analyst predicts Bitcoin could decouple from stocks due to tariff-fueled recession, with 50% chance of US recession in 2025.

news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C., Krispy Kreme is providing a tax relief offer for the third year in a row. On Tuesday, April 15, customers buying any dozen doughnuts at full price in-store can get a second Original Glazed dozen for just the sales tax. Additionally, those ordering a dozen online at regular price for pickup or delivery can apply promo code TAXBREAK to get a free second Original Glazed dozen. This initiative aims to delight Americans on Tax Day by offering them a sweet deal on their favorite treats, making it a popular choice for enjoying delicious doughnuts at a discounted rate.
news.headline: Krispy Kreme offers Tax Day deal: Buy 1 dozen, get 2nd Original Glazed for sales tax cost in-store or free online.

news.summary: In Gwangju, an illegal gaming site was disguised as a virtual currency exchange and mining operation.
news.headline: South Korean authorities dismantle illegal gambling ring in Gwangju disguised as a crypto mining front. #cryptocurrency #police #bust
